ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., AL, AK, AZ) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* Official website of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the expenditure data applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the expenditure data is reported */,
  "personal_health_care" REAL /* Personal health care expenditures per state */,
  "hospital_services" REAL /* Hospital services expenses per state */,
  "physician_and_clinical_services" REAL /* Physician and clinical services expenses per state */,
  "other_professional_services" REAL /* Other professional services expenses per state */,
  "home_health_care" REAL /* Home health care expenses per state */,
  "drugs_and_non_durable" REAL /* Drugs and non-durable medical expenses per state */,
  "durable_medical_expenses" REAL /* Durable medical equipment expenses per state */,
  "other_health_care_expenses" REAL /* Other health care expenses per state */,
  "total_health_care_expenses" REAL /* Total health care expenses per state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state for the given year */,
  "per_capita_expenditure" REAL /* Per capita healthcare expenditure */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the given year */,
  "federal_funding" REAL /* Amount of federal funding received for healthcare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_expenditures_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_19_data" (
  "covid_19_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the COVID-19 data applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the COVID-19 data is reported */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the state */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the state */,
  "cases_per_100k" REAL /* Number of cases per 100,000 people */,
  "deaths_per_100k" REAL /* Number of deaths per 100,000 people */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_19_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_19_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_expenses" (
  "yearly_expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly expenditure record */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure record for which the yearly data applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the expenditure data is reported */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total healthcare expenditure for the year */,
  "inflation_adjusted_total" REAL /* Inflation-adjusted total healthcare expenditure */,
  "federal_funding" REAL /* Amount of federal funding received for healthcare */,
  "state_funding" REAL /* Amount of state funding received for healthcare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearly_expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_expenses_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES healthcare_expenditures ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure category (e.g., personal health care, hospital services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each expenditure category */,
  "category_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the category in healthcare expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category to which the subcategory belongs */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure subcategory */,
  "subcategory_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each expenditure subcategory */,
  "subcategory_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the subcategory in healthcare expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the demographic data applies */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the state's population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state's population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state's population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_19_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the vaccination data applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the vaccination data is reported */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people vaccinated in the state */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "booster_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has received booster shots */,
  "vaccination_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of different types of vaccines (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_19_vaccinations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state in which the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_website" TEXT /* Official website of the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the healthcare facility (e.g., number of beds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facilities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility that offers the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each service */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_services_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the staff member is employed */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "staff_email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "staff_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "staff_qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications of the staff member */,
  "staff_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the patient is being treated */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "patient_address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "patient_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "patient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "patient_insurance" TEXT /* Insurance information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who made the visit */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the visit took place */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., check-up, emergency) */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "visit_diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "visit_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided during the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments made during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_data ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit during which the service was provided */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each service */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_services_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)
